sections.notes: Category headers (DAIRY, GROCERY, BAKERY). Underlined on ~41% of lines - the only meaningful underline signal on the receipt. Slightly taller than body (cap 1.071); stroke normal (1.012). n=287.
sections.name: section_header

sections.notes: Split from 'summary' after adversarial verification REFUTED the bucket median: BALANCE DUE prints visibly bolder and taller on held-out scans (stroke 4.0px vs body 3.0px = +33%, height 44-45px vs 40-41px = +10%). The summary bucket's n=577 median was diluted by CHANGE/TAX/CREDIT lines. Verified on 03fa2d0f#1 and d5f79185#1.
sections.name: balance_due
sections.display: Bold + 10% taller — the only bold line

sections.notes: Slightly condensed print (cap_rel med 0.921, stroke 0.958); card/auth block. n=1917. RENDERER NOTE: measured cap_rel 0.921 but per-receipt OCR sizing already absorbs most of the condensation; applying the full 0.90 double-counts and drifted right-aligned payment segments 25px on the review receipt (blocker). 0.95 keeps the visual cue without the drift.
sections.name: payment

sections.notes: Distinctly smaller (cap_rel med 0.844) and lighter (stroke_rel med 0.733) than body; long numeric strings under the barcode. n=219.
sections.name: barcode_caption
